Recovery exception summary

Summary card that should not be part of the extracted body.

Recovery exception matrix

Recovery exception matrices matter when operators need a compact map of which safeguards can be temporarily relaxed while core service health is restored.

The most reliable teams pair exception windows with audit checkpoints, throughput safeguards, and region-specific rollback triggers.

In practice, recovery owners still need to verify queue depth, grace thresholds, fallback regions, and approval evidence before any exception is extended.

The document emphasizes that recovery decisions should preserve shared throughput stability even when temporary credits or waivers are granted.
